nodes.name: Webhook: Client Onboard
nodes.notes: Receives the long-form onboarding payload from page 24. Creates client, brand profile, offer context, onboarding steps, and triggers Vercel project creation.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $json.body.name, code: $json.body.code, website_url: $json.body.website_url || null, status: 'onboarding', primary_contact_email: $json.body.primary_contact_email || null, slack_channel_id: $json.body.slack_channel_id || null, google_drive_folder: $json.body.google_drive_folder || null }) }}

nodes.name: Insert Client
nodes.notes: Create the client row. Returns the new row with id.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: $json.client_id, name: $json.webhook.brand_name || $json.webhook.name, brand_colors: $json.webhook.brand_colors || {}, tone: $json.webhook.tone || null, voice_guidelines: $json.webhook.voice_guidelines || null, avoid_words: $json.webhook.avoid_words || [], logo_url: $json.webhook.logo_url || null }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ brand_id: $json.brand_id, name: $json.webhook.offer_name || ($json.webhook.product_name ? ($json.webhook.product_name + ' Offer') : 'Primary Offer'), product_name: $json.webhook.product_name || null, product_description: $json.webhook.product_description || null, offer_details: $json.webhook.offer_details || null, price_point: $json.webhook.price_point || null, awareness_level: $json.webhook.awareness_level || 'problem_aware', pain_points: $json.webhook.pain_points || [], desires: $json.webhook.desires || [], objections: $json.webhook.objections || [], unique_mechanism: $json.webhook.unique_mechanism || null, proof_points: $json.webhook.proof_points || null, icp: $json.webhook.icp || null, competitors: $json.webhook.competitors || [] }) }}

nodes.name: Insert Onboarding Steps
nodes.notes: Bulk insert the 8 onboarding step rows. Supabase accepts an array for batch insert.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ project_name: $('Parse Client ID').first().json.webhook.code, brand_id: $('Parse Brand ID').first().json.brand_id }) }}

nodes.name: Trigger Vercel Create
nodes.notes: Fires workflow 15 to create the Vercel landing page project for this client. continueOnFail so a Vercel outage doesn't break onboarding.
